name: @prune/knowledge
description: f21+f22 — Verified Repo Memory. f21 Repository Knowledge Compiler: compiles a repo into a persistent, content-SHA-keyed asset (symbols, dependency graph, ownership, churn signals) with deterministic extraction and incremental recompilation. f22 Proof-Carrying Asset Store: a knowledge store where every entry carries provenance (source content-SHAs), optional Ed25519 signature, utility record, and a validity status re-checked on every read — entries invalidated by code change demote themselves; writes are sentinel-screened. No model calls, no regex, anywhere in decision logic.
